$comment: Ready-to-use JSON-LD snippets for SCHEMA-REPORT.md recommendations. Each entry shows the helper-style replacement and the rendered JSON-LD it produces.

recommendations.title: Replacement for deprecated ClaimReview (C1)
recommendations.context: Google retired ClaimReview from rich results June 2025. Use a CreativeWork with citation pointing at the audit source, embedded inside the case study Article schema. AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) treat this as a citable claim with provenance.

rendered_example.name: 40% of inbound traffic had no source/medium attribution in the previous measurement stack.
rendered_example.text: 40% of inbound traffic had no source/medium attribution in the previous measurement stack.

isBasedOn.name: Palladium Hotel Group internal audit · April 2026

recommendations.title: WebSite + potentialAction for sitelinks search box (W2)
recommendations.context: Patch organizationSchema() to enable Google's sitelinks search box on the brand SERP. The url-template syntax is Google's documented contract; ?q= is just a placeholder route the user submits to.
recommendations.caveat: Site must actually accept ?q= URLs and route to a results page. If you don't have a /search route yet, skip this until you build one — Google ignores the SearchAction otherwise.

recommendations.title: Remove dead/deprecated helpers (W3)
Add speakable to homepage (M2)
recommendations.import_addition:
// Already exported from @/lib/schema, just add to the import list:
import { speakableWebPageSchema } from "@/lib/schema";

recommendations.title: Reconcile pricing AggregateOffer range (M1)
recommendations.context: Today highPrice=899 reflects only annual pricing. With both billing modes visible to users, the range should span €499 → €1079 (Growth annual → Scale monthly).

recommendations.title: Person schema for named case-study sources (M3)
recommendations.context: Toni Andújar (Palladium) and Eduardo Martin (Dreamplace) are cited as quote authors but only as strings inside Quotation.spokenByCharacter. Elevating them to standalone Person entities gives AI engines a citable Person URI per quote.

subjectOf.name: Palladium Hotel Group case study — A neutral single source of truth
Dreamplace Hotels case study — Paid media on real data

recommendations.where_to_add: Add as a `<JsonLd>` block at the top of each case-study page.tsx (EN + ES = 4 files). New helper recommendation: `casePersonSchema()` in src/lib/schema.ts.
